texto: My grandmother was energetic and fearless - a talented poet and songwriter. She could have become anything, but this was the 1930s, and she was forced into an arranged marriage.

texto: Botox, trust me I've been tempted - but I resist! Think about what happens to your muscles - and your skin - if you're sick and don't move for a few days. It all atrophies!
